case_title: MICHAEL L METCALF VS. MARVELLE L KOENIG

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-05-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-24-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
